board_csa_architect.notes: Clean sub-REQ separation. UI layer respects backend enforcement, no architectural concerns.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Anti-AC explicitly requires UI to not bypass privilegeGate. MFA gate for tier promotion included. Tier visibility restricted for Tier 3/4.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Frontend components use existing theme tokens and dashboard shell. No new AI/model requirements.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Standard React components. No infrastructure impact. Depends on L6-33 backend — correct ordering.

board_red_team.notes: UI-only layer. Backend enforcement is the source of truth. No attack surface added.
